assertions.description: The PointerEvent constructor exists, allowing untrusted PointerEvents to be constructed in JS.
PointerEventInit accepts a coalescedEvents sequence and surfaces it via getCoalescedEvents().
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const c=new PointerEvent('pointermove',{clientX:11,clientY:22});const e=new PointerEvent('pointermove',{coalescedEvents:[c]});const list=e.getCoalescedEvents();return list.length===1 && list[0].clientX===11 && list[0].clientY===22;}catch(err){return false;}})()

assertions.description: For an untrusted PointerEvent, dispatching does not overwrite the target of its coalesced entries.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const a=document.createElement('div');const b=document.createElement('div');document.body.append(a,b);const inner=new PointerEvent('pointermove',{clientX:1,clientY:2});Object.defineProperty(inner,'target',{value:a,configurable:true});const e=new PointerEvent('pointermove',{coalescedEvents:[inner]});b.dispatchEvent(e);const got=e.getCoalescedEvents()[0];const ok=got!==e && (got.target===a||got.target===null);a.remove();b.remove();return ok;}catch(err){return false;}})()

assertions.description: PointerEventInit accepts a predictedEvents sequence; getPredictedEvents() returns the supplied list.
Untrusted PointerEvents preserve each coalesced and predicted entry's original offsetX/Y after construction and dispatch.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{if(typeof PointerEvent!=='function'||typeof PointerEvent.prototype.getCoalescedEvents!=='function'||typeof PointerEvent.prototype.getPredictedEvents!=='function')return false;const target=document.createElement('div');target.style.cssText='position:fixed;left:123px;top:77px;width:20px;height:20px;padding:0;border:0;';document.body.append(target);const coalesced=new PointerEvent('pointermove',{clientX:301,clientY:211});const predicted=new PointerEvent('pointermove',{clientX:307,clientY:217});const expected=[coalesced.offsetX,coalesced.offsetY,predicted.offsetX,predicted.offsetY];let seen=false,ok=false;target.addEventListener('pointermove',ev=>{const c=ev.getCoalescedEvents();const p=ev.getPredictedEvents();seen=true;ok=c.length===1&&p.length===1&&c[0].offsetX===expected[0]&&c[0].offsetY===expected[1]&&p[0].offsetX===expected[2]&&p[0].offsetY===expected[3];},{once:true});const parent=new PointerEvent('pointermove',{bubbles:true,clientX:11,clientY:13,coalescedEvents:[coalesced],predictedEvents:[predicted]});target.dispatchEvent(parent);target.remove();return seen&&ok;}catch(err){return false;}})()
